results.name: savai
results.description:
The red-white-black-aligned triome of Ikoria.
Grassy plains atop mountainous cliff faces and swampy subterranean tunnels.

results.name: scale
results.description: As found on a lizard. For the measuring tool, see [Balance Scale](balance-scale).

results.name: scale animal
results.description: Uses animals of known size around the subject to demonstrate its immense scale. For scale birds, see [scale bird](https://tagger.scryfall.com/tags/artwork/scale-bird)

results.name: scale armor
results.description: Mail armor made of overlapping scales.

results.name: scale bird
results.description: Uses birds flying around the subject to demonstrate the subject's immense scale.

results.name: scale humanoid
results.description: Uses humanoids of known size around the subject to demonstrate its immense scale.

results.name: scale ship
results.description: Uses ships around the subject to demonstrate its immense scale.

results.name: scales with multiple
results.description: Cards that scale as you play more copies of themselves.

results.name: scales with power
results.description: Effects which scale with the power of one or more creatures.

results.name: scale tree
results.description: Uses trees around the subject to demonstrate its immense scale.

results.name: scaroth
results.description: The last of the Jagaroths, fractured across time. Antagonist of the classic  Doctor Who serial "City of Death".

results.name: scene-ulamog-kozilek-fall
results.description: In Oath of the Gatewatch, Jace and Nissa trapped Ulamog and Kozilek using the world's leylines, and Chandra lit them on fire. That was a bad day for Ulamog and Kozilek.

results.name: scooch dice
results.description: Just nudge the result a little, it's not cheating I promise.
